allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''electron-updater''\); console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''type of default:'', typeof m.default\); console.log\(''type of autoUpdater:'', typeof m.autoUpdater\); if \(m.default\) console.log\(''default keys:'', Object.keys\(m.default\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''electron-updater''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''default keys:'', m.default ? Object.keys\(m.default\) : ''no default''\); console.log\(''typeof m.autoUpdater:'', typeof m.autoUpdater\); }\)")
